_comment: Semrush MCP server. The user's API key is injected from plugin userConfig (semrush_api_key). BEFORE PUBLISHING: replace the placeholder command/args/url below with the real Semrush MCP launch method you intend to ship (a self-hosted stdio command, or a remote URL + key). See README.md > 'Configure the Semrush MCP'. Until then, leave the key blank to run skills without live Semrush data.
